subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of the Merciful. Spiritual bounties and the illumination of divine grace result from steadfastness in the love of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی فیض وجدانی و فوز نورانی از نتائج ثبوت بر محبت الهی و استقامت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
